untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (Broadening Tops identification) and volume trend classification (Rising/Falling/U-shaped/Dome-shaped) which cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and standard indicators. The performance outcomes are contingent on both pattern type and volume trend category, which require multi-bar pattern analysis beyond allowed operators.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally relies on: (1) identifying a specific candlestick pattern (Broadening Tops) over multiple bars, (2) classifying volume trends into discrete categories (Rising/Falling/U-shaped/Dome-shaped), and (3) applying different statistical outcomes based on market regime + breakout direction + volume trend. A partial implementation using volume breakout (volume > prev_volume) is provided, but misses the critical pattern recognition and volume trend classification logic that drives the rule. The performance statistics (27%, -14%, -21%, 32%, etc.) are regime and trend-dependent outputs that cannot be encoded as simple entry/exit rules.
